title: Invalid objectId when adding multiple labels in Trello node
symptom: When trying to add multiple labels to a Trello card using the Trello node, n8n throws an 'Invalid objectId' error.
not_this_if: Only one label ID is being used
root_cause: The error occurs because the Trello node expects a specific format for multiple label IDs. If there are hidden whitespaces or incorrect formatting in the expression used to pass the IDs, it can lead to this error.
fix_steps: Check the expression used to pass label IDs for hidden whitespaces
Ensure that label IDs are formatted correctly as an array
Test the workflow again with the corrected expression
agent_instruction: Inspect and correct the expression for label IDs in the Trello node to remove any hidden whitespaces.
